name: select
title: Select
description: Single or multi choice field with label and sizes.

api.description: Select composes Option List for the open panel. Configure the root, field chrome, trigger, value display, content, and items below.

groups.title: Select
groups.description: Root state for single or multi choice, open state, disabled, and validation.

props.name: selectionMode
props.description: Single value or multiple values.

props.name: value
props.description: Controlled value in single mode.

props.name: defaultValue
props.description: Uncontrolled initial value in single mode.

props.name: onValueChange
props.description: Called when the single value changes.

props.name: values
props.description: Controlled values in multiple mode.

props.name: defaultValues
props.description: Uncontrolled initial values in multiple mode.

props.name: onValuesChange
props.description: Called when multiple values change.

props.name: open
props.description: Controlled open state for the option list.

props.name: defaultOpen
props.description: Uncontrolled initial open state.

props.name: onOpenChange
props.description: Called when the panel opens or closes.

props.name: closeOnSelect
props.description: Close after choosing a row. Defaults to true in single mode, false in multiple.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Non-interactive state with a muted fill, hairline border, and muted value text. Keeps the menu closed.

props.name: invalid
props.description: Validation state. Sets aria-invalid on the trigger and applies the destructive border with --focus-ring-error. Hint text stays muted.

groups.title: SelectField
groups.description: Optional label, subtext, and hint. Labels can sit above the control, overlap the top border, or stack inside the trigger.

props.name: label
props.description: Field title. outside renders above the control. overlap sits on the top border with a notch. inset stacks above the value inside the trigger.

props.name: labelPosition
props.description: outside places the label above the field. overlap pins a compact label on the top border with a surface-colored notch. inset stacks a muted label above the value inside the trigger chrome.

props.name: subtext
props.description: Secondary supporting line. With outside, uses the kit Label subtext slot under the title. With overlap or inset, renders above the control. Pass a string or any custom node.

props.name: required
props.description: Shows the required mark on the label.

props.name: help
props.description: Help control after the label (for example SelectFieldHelp inside a Tooltip). With overlap or inset, sits beside the field title.

props.name: hint
props.description: Supporting text below the control. Pass a string or any custom node. Omit to hide. Stays muted in the invalid state.

props.name: hintColor
props.description: Hint color. Prefer tokens such as var(--muted-foreground). Sets --df-select-hint.

props.name: hintClassName
props.description: Additional classes on the hint line.

props.name: hintId
props.description: Id for the hint; pair with the describedby ARIA attribute on the trigger.

props.name: labelColor
props.description: Owned label color. Prefer tokens such as var(--foreground) or var(--muted-foreground). Sets --df-select-label. Overlap and inset default to muted-foreground.

props.name: labelClassName
props.description: Additional classes on the owned Label.

props.name: invalidLabel
props.description: When Select invalid is true, tint the owned label with the error color. Set false to keep the label at its normal color.

props.name: errorLabelColor
props.description: Owned label color when invalid and invalidLabel are true. Prefer tokens such as var(--destructive). Sets --df-select-error-label.

props.name: overlapLabelBackground
props.description: Notch fill behind the overlap label. Match the surface behind the field. Prefer tokens such as var(--background). Sets --df-select-overlap-label-bg.

props.name: overlapInset
props.description: Distance from the trigger leading edge to the overlap label. Prefer spacing tokens. Align with trigger paddingLeft. Sets --df-select-overlap-inset.

props.name: overlapLabelPadding
props.description: Horizontal padding on the overlap label chip so the border notch clears the text. Prefer spacing tokens. Sets --df-select-overlap-label-pad.

props.name: overlapLabelSize
props.description: Overlap label font size. Prefer type tokens such as var(--df-text-11). Sets --df-select-overlap-label-size.

props.name: insetLabelSize
props.description: Inset label font size. Prefer type tokens such as var(--df-text-11). Sets --df-select-inset-label-size.

props.name: insetGap
props.description: Vertical gap between the inset label and the value. Prefer spacing tokens. Sets --df-select-inset-gap.

props.name: htmlFor
props.description: Associates the label with the trigger id.

props.name: className
props.description: Layout width and spacing for the field shell.

groups.title: SelectTrigger
groups.description: Combobox host for the visible control. Variant, sizes, padding, width, radius, and truncation are configured here.

props.name: variant
props.description: primary is a surface fill with a hairline border. secondary is a soft secondary wash with secondary-foreground value text and a transparent border.

props.name: size
props.description: T-shirt height and type size. "default" is an alias for "md".

props.name: padding
props.description: Padding on all sides. Prefer spacing tokens such as calc(2 * var(--spacing-unit)). Sets each --df-select-padding-* side. Inset label position uses a roomier default recipe; these props override it.

props.name: paddingX
props.description: Horizontal padding. Sets --df-select-padding-left and --df-select-padding-right. Overrides padding on those sides.

props.name: paddingY
props.description: Vertical padding. Sets --df-select-padding-top and --df-select-padding-bottom. Overrides padding on those sides.

props.name: paddingTop
props.description: Top padding. Prefer spacing tokens. Sets --df-select-padding-top and wins over paddingY and padding.

props.name: paddingRight
props.description: Right padding. Prefer spacing tokens. Sets --df-select-padding-right and wins over paddingX and padding.

props.name: paddingBottom
props.description: Bottom padding. Prefer spacing tokens. Sets --df-select-padding-bottom and wins over paddingY and padding.

props.name: paddingLeft
props.description: Left padding. Prefer spacing tokens. Sets --df-select-padding-left and wins over paddingX and padding.

props.name: leadingIcon
props.description: Decorative icon at the start of the trigger, before SelectValue.

props.name: background
props.description: Trigger fill. Prefer tokens such as var(--background). Sets --df-select-bg and overrides the variant recipe.

props.name: borderColor
props.description: Trigger border color. Prefer tokens such as var(--input). Sets --df-select-border.

props.name: errorBorderColor
props.description: Invalid border color. Prefer tokens such as var(--destructive). Sets --df-select-error-border.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Overrides Select disabled when set on the trigger.

props.name: invalid
props.description: Overrides Select invalid when set on the trigger. Also accepts aria-invalid.

props.name: className
props.description: Width and shape. Examples: w-64 (fixed width), w-36 (truncate), rounded-xl or rounded-full (radius override). Default radius uses the kit --radius-4xl token.

props.name: id
props.description: For label association and accessibility.

props.name: aria-describedby
props.description: Point at SelectField hintId when a hint is shown.

props.name: aria-invalid
props.description: Native invalid flag. Merged with Select invalid and the trigger invalid prop.

groups.title: SelectValue
groups.description: Shows the placeholder, selected label, or a custom render. When the selected SelectItem uses layout stacked with secondary, the trigger mirrors that stack. Compose kit Badge beside the label in SelectItem children to show a status pill in the trigger and list.

props.name: placeholder
props.description: Pre-select copy when no value is chosen.

props.name: children
props.description: Static content or a render function with selectionMode, value, values, labelFor, secondaryFor, layoutFor, and toggleValue. Omit to use the label registered from SelectItem, including any Badge composed into that label. Default single-select render stacks title and description only when the selected item layout is stacked.

props.name: className
props.description: Value text styles. Truncation follows a fixed width trigger.

groups.title: SelectValueSummary & SelectValueBadge
groups.description: Multi-select value displays used inside SelectValue. For a status pill on a single selection, compose Badge inside SelectItem children instead.

props.name: SelectValueSummary.count
props.description: Primary count text, for example “2 selected”.

props.name: SelectValueSummary.supportingText
props.description: Muted secondary detail, for example “16 users”.

props.name: SelectValueBadge.value
props.description: Selected option value; remove toggles this value off.

props.name: SelectValueBadge.children
props.description: Badge label. Defaults to the registered option label.

props.name: SelectValueBadge.onRemove
props.description: Optional custom remove handler instead of toggleValue.

groups.title: SelectContent
groups.description: Open Option List panel. Same API as OptionListContent.

props.name: align
props.description: Horizontal anchor relative to the trigger. auto picks the best fit.

props.name: alignItemWithTrigger
props.description: When true, menu width matches the trigger. When false, the menu hugs option content (and stays at least as wide as the trigger).

props.name: side
props.description: Preferred placement side.

props.name: sideOffset
props.description: Gap between trigger and panel.

props.name: alignOffset
props.description: Shift along the alignment axis.

props.name: portal
props.description: Render in a portal. Set false for inline previews.

props.name: dismissOnScroll
props.description: Close when the page scrolls. Scrolling inside the list stays open. Set false to keep the panel following the trigger (it can cover sticky chrome).

props.name: search
props.description: Show a search field above the options.

props.name: searchPlaceholder
props.description: Placeholder for the search field.

props.name: searchValue
props.description: Controlled search query.

props.name: defaultSearchValue
props.description: Uncontrolled initial search query.

props.name: onSearchChange
props.description: Called when the search query changes.

props.name: scrollable
props.description: Wrap options in the kit ScrollArea (custom scrollbar). Defaults on for plain panels and off when the panel contains a submenu; pass explicitly to override.

props.name: scrollMaxHeight
props.description: Max height of the scrollable body before it scrolls (stacked panels default to 16rem). When the panel opens, the selected option scrolls into the list scrollport while list order stays the same.

props.name: scrollThumbGap
props.description: Space on each side of the scrollbar thumb, in pixels. Defaults to one spacing unit via --df-option-list-scroll-thumb-gap.

props.name: footer
props.description: Footer actions under the options (for example Reset).

props.name: className
props.description: Panel surface styles.

groups.title: SelectItem
groups.description: Option row. Same API as OptionListItem, including leading icons, trailing badges, and nested chevrons.

props.name: value
props.description: Option value stored in Select state.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Not selectable row.

props.name: leading
props.description: Option List leading slot. Pass an icon or other node for row icons; works with layout stacked. Use "checkbox" for multi-select. Pair with SelectTrigger leadingIcon when the trigger should mirror the selected icon.

props.name: secondary
props.description: Supporting copy beside or under the label.

props.name: layout
props.description: inline places secondary beside the label; stacked places it underneath. With leading, the icon aligns to the title line. Select mirrors stacked layout in the trigger value.

props.name: trailing
props.description: End of row slot: badge counter, nested menu chevron, or both. When set, the selected check is hidden unless indicator is forced on.

props.name: indicator
props.description: Selected check in single mode. Defaults off when leading is checkbox or trailing is set; otherwise on.

props.name: children
props.description: Primary label registered for SelectValue. Compose a kit Badge beside a text span to show a status pill in the list and trigger.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional row styles.

props.name: …div attributes
props.description: Native div props. Use the highlighted data attribute for hover or open parent rows in nested menus.

groups.title: Field composition parts
groups.description: Use these when composing a field outside SelectField, or when placing SelectFieldHelp inside a Tooltip.

props.name: SelectFieldLabel.children
props.description: Label title content.

props.name: SelectFieldLabel.subtext
props.description: Secondary supporting line under the title. Same as Label subtext.

props.name: SelectFieldLabel.htmlFor
props.description: Associates the label with the SelectTrigger id.

props.name: SelectFieldLabel.required
props.description: Shows the required mark on the label.

props.name: SelectFieldLabel.help
props.description: Trailing help control after the label (typically SelectFieldHelp).

props.name: SelectFieldLabel.className
props.description: Additional classes on the Label root.

props.name: SelectFieldHelp.label
props.description: Accessible name for the help button.

props.name: SelectFieldHelp.className
props.description: Additional classes on the help button.

props.name: SelectFieldHelp.…button attributes
props.description: Native button attributes (onClick, type, and others).

props.name: SelectFieldHint.children
props.description: Supporting text below the control. Pass a string or any custom node.

props.name: SelectFieldHint.color
props.description: Hint color. Prefer tokens such as var(--muted-foreground). Sets --df-select-hint.

props.name: SelectFieldHint.id
props.description: Hint id. Pair with aria-describedby on SelectTrigger.

props.name: SelectFieldHint.className
props.description: Additional classes on the hint.

props.name: SelectFieldHint.style
props.description: Inline styles on the hint. Can also set --df-select-hint for color.

groups.title: List composition parts
groups.description: Option List aliases for grouping rows inside SelectContent.

props.name: SelectGroup
props.description: Groups related items. Same as OptionListGroup.

props.name: SelectLabel
props.description: Muted group heading inside the panel. Same as OptionListLabel.

props.name: SelectSeparator
props.description: Horizontal rule between sections. Same as OptionListSeparator.

props.name: SelectScrollUpButton / SelectScrollDownButton
props.description: Optional scroll affordances for long lists. Same as OptionList scroll buttons.

groups.title: Layout & appearance
groups.description: Common configurations that are not single named props. Use className and tokens.

props.name: Radius
props.description: Trigger uses the kit radius token. Override with className such as rounded-xl or rounded-full utilities.

props.name: Corner shape
props.description: Curve style for rounded chrome. Set once with df-ui init --corner-shape (round or smooth), or override --df-corner-shape on :root.

props.name: Fixed width
props.description: Set an explicit width (for example w-64). Multi-select badges wrap to new lines and the trigger grows in height.

props.name: Text truncation
props.description: Constrain width (for example w-36). SelectValue ellipsizes the selected label. The open list still hugs options unless alignItemWithTrigger is true.

props.name: Hug content
props.description: Default menu sizing: width follows the longest option (nowrap rows).

props.name: Match trigger width
props.description: Lock the menu to the trigger width. Useful for fixed width multi-select fields.

groups.title: Tokens
groups.description: Theme defaults live on :root. Override these globally or on a local host.

props.name: --df-menu-min-width
props.description: Minimum open panel width.

props.name: --df-menu-max-height
props.description: Maximum panel height before scrolling.

props.name: --df-select-padding-top
props.description: Top content padding. Set by padding, paddingY, or paddingTop. Inset label defaults to calc(3 * var(--spacing-unit)).

props.name: --df-select-padding-right
props.description: Right content padding. Set by padding, paddingX, or paddingRight. Inset label defaults to calc(3.5 * var(--spacing-unit)).

props.name: --df-select-padding-bottom
props.description: Bottom content padding. Set by padding, paddingY, or paddingBottom. Inset label defaults to calc(3 * var(--spacing-unit)).

props.name: --df-select-padding-left
props.description: Left content padding. Set by padding, paddingX, or paddingLeft. Inset label defaults to calc(3.5 * var(--spacing-unit)).

props.name: --df-select-hint
props.description: Hint line color. Set by SelectField hintColor or SelectFieldHint color.

props.name: --df-select-label
props.description: Owned label color. Set by SelectField labelColor. Overlap defaults to muted-foreground.

props.name: --df-select-error-label
props.description: Owned label color when invalidLabel is active. Set by SelectField errorLabelColor.

props.name: --df-select-overlap-label-bg
props.description: Notch fill for overlap labels. Set by SelectField overlapLabelBackground.

props.name: --df-select-overlap-inset
props.description: Leading inset for the overlap label. Set by SelectField overlapInset.

props.name: --df-select-overlap-label-pad
props.description: Horizontal padding on the overlap label chip. Set by SelectField overlapLabelPadding.

props.name: --df-select-overlap-label-size
props.description: Overlap label font size. Set by SelectField overlapLabelSize.

props.name: --df-select-inset-label-size
props.description: Inset label font size. Set by SelectField insetLabelSize.

props.name: --df-select-inset-gap
props.description: Gap between inset label and value. Set by SelectField insetGap.

props.name: --df-select-error-border
props.description: Invalid trigger border. Set by SelectTrigger errorBorderColor.

props.name: --focus-ring-error
props.description: Invalid focus ring recipe shared with Input.

props.name: --df-select-icon-size
props.description: Leading icon box size on SelectTrigger. Scales with size.

props.name: --df-select-line-height
props.description: Value and placeholder leading. Paired with the size step as an even pixel value so single-line text centers without sub-pixel drift.

props.name: --df-select-optical-shift
props.description: Upward correction for trigger value text with chevron and icons. Applied as twice this value of bottom margin on the value. Badge values and inset labels are box centered and skip it. Defaults to --df-control-optical-shift.

props.name: --df-select-bg
props.description: Trigger fill. Set by variant or the background prop.

props.name: --df-select-border
props.description: Trigger border. Set by variant or the borderColor prop.

props.name: --border
props.description: Panel and shared border token.

props.name: --background
props.description: Primary fill default.

props.name: --popover
props.description: Open panel fill.

props.name: --popover-foreground
props.description: Open panel text color.

props.name: --accent
props.description: Hover and highlight row fill.

props.name: --accent-foreground
props.description: Hover and highlight row text.

props.name: --df-corner-shape
props.description: Theme corner curve for all kit chrome. round = circular arcs; smooth = continuous squircle. Set with df-ui init --corner-shape, or override on :root. Default round.
